seed.$description: Brand-level seed tokens — the minimal set that defines the entire design system. Change one value here and all derived tokens (map, semantic, component) shift accordingly.

brandRed.$description: Brand red — alert / urgency accent. Moved from mp/globals.css per ADR 0024 phase 3.

inkBone.$description: Ink mode bone — light surface tone for case-study route override. Moved from mp/globals.css per ADR 0024 phase 3.

inkDeep.$description: Ink mode deep — dark surface tone for case-study route override. Moved from mp/globals.css per ADR 0024 phase 3.

colorTextBase.$description: Base text color (graphite) — alpha derivatives computed in map tier

colorBgBase.$description: Base background color (cream) — surfaces derived in map tier

fontSize.$description: Base font size in px — type scale derived via major third (1.25) ratio

sizeUnit.$description: Base spatial unit in px — all spacing = sizeUnit × (sizeStep + offset)

sizeStep.$description: Step multiplier — combined with sizeUnit produces 4/8/12/16/20/24/32/40/48 scale

controlHeight.$description: Default control height in px (md = h-10). SM=32, LG=48 derived in map tier.

borderRadius.$description: Base border radius in px (sm). Scale derived in map tier: XS=2, SM=4, MD=8, LG=12.

lineWidth.$description: Default border width in px — neo-brutalist thick border

motionEnabled.$description: Enable animations globally — respects prefers-reduced-motion. Renamed from `motion` in ADR 0024 phase 8b to free up the `seed.motion` path for the duration+easing primitive tree in primitives.json (previously dropped on merge due to leaf/branch collision).

motionBase.$description: Base motion duration in seconds — derivatives add motionUnit increments

motionUnit.$description: Duration increment in seconds — motionBase + N × motionUnit

durationInstant.$description: Instant feedback duration (was --dur-instant in mp). Used for taps + micro-feedback.

durationFast.$description: Fast UI duration (hover, micro-interactions). Ant alphabet motionUnit×1 (0.1s) — kept in sync with seed.motion.duration.fast (ADR 0027 Stage 2). NOTE: duplicate of the seed.motion tree; consolidation is a tracked follow-up.

durationBase.$description: Base UI duration (was --dur-base in mp). Most state transitions.

durationSlow.$description: Slow UI duration (was --dur-slow in mp). Card lifts, page transitions.

durationSlower.$description: Slower UI duration (was --dur-slower in mp). Surface morphs.

durationThemeFade.$description: Canonical engine cross-fade duration (was --dur-theme-fade in mp). Used by every depth-toggle and heat-axis transition.

zIndexModal.$description: Modal layer z-index (was --z-modal in mp). Top of UI stack — GateOverlay, sheets, dialogs above all other surfaces.
